html:
Exclusive to:

Palmcone Trees are Plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be found on Moon Quay Island. They are renewable through the Palmcone Sprouts dropped from an Unnatural Portal.

Chopping a tall Palmcone Tree will drop 3 Logs along with 2 Palmcone Scales and 1 Palmcone Sprout. Digging its stump will result in 2 additional Logs.

Tips

  • As Palmcone Trees only drop 1 Palmcone Sprout at their Tall stage, the only way to get more Palmcone Trees is through the Unnatural Portal.
  • Palmcone Trees are a great alternative to Evergreens, as they drop more logs and Palmcone Scales, which are required to craft the Cannon Kit and Dock Kit.
  • Palmcone Trees do not spawn Treeguards, allowing for repeated log harvests using Bearger's charge attack without putting Bearger at risk.

Gallery

  • Burnt
  • Concept art of Palmcone Tree shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“Kind of piney, for a palm tree.”
–Wilson
“Ooooh, another tree to burn!”
–Willow
“Is tough tree.”
–Wolfgang
“Your hardened exterior won't protect you from the world.”
–Wendy
“ANOTHER TREE. HOW DISAPPOINTING”
–WX-78
“It appears to be from the family Arecaceae, yet possesses some coniferous characteristics.”
–Wickerbottom
“We don't have these up North.”
–Woodie
“I'm beginning to forget what real palm trees looked like.”
–Maxwell
“It hath a möst hardy exteriör.”
–Wigfrid
“It looks hard to climb.”
–Webber
“C'est dommage, it's not a fruit-bearing tree.”
–Warly
“Came from far away”
–Wormwood
“That's gotta be one of those tropical trees.”
–Winona
“Perhaps the tough bark is for warding off sharks.”
–Wortox
“It a really weird tree.”
–Wurt
“Here it- nope, wait, this one isn't in my handbook either.”
–Walter
“Have I seen that somewhere before? I can't quite recall.”
–Wanda
Palmcone Trees are Plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be found on Moon Quay Island. They are renewable through the Palmcone Sprouts dropped from an Unnatural Portal.
Chopping a tall Palmcone Tree will drop 3 Logs along with 2 Palmcone Scales and 1 Palmcone Sprout. Digging its stump will result in 2 additional Logs.
Tips[edit | edit source]
As Palmcone Trees only drop 1 Palmcone Sprout at their Tall stage, the only way to get more Palmcone Trees is through the Unnatural Portal.
Palmcone Trees are a great alternative to Evergreens, as they drop more logs and Palmcone Scales, which are required to craft the Cannon Kit and Dock Kit.
Palmcone Trees do not spawn Treeguards, allowing for repeated log harvests using Bearger's charge attack without putting Bearger at risk.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cây Palmcone là Thực vật độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật The Curse of Moon Quay. Nó có thể được tìm thấy trên đảo Moon Quay. Chúng có thể được tái tạo thông qua Palmcone Sprouts rơi từ Cổng phi tự nhiên.

Digging its stump will result in 2 additional Logs. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * As Palmcone Trees only drop 1 Palmcone Sprout at their Tall stage, the only way to get more Palmcone Trees is through the Unnatural Portal. * Palmcone Trees are a great alternative to [[Evergreen]]s, as they drop more logs and Palmcone Scales, which are required to craft the [[Cannon Kit]] and [[Dock Kit]]. *Palmcone Trees do not spawn [[Treeguard]]s, allowing for repeated log harvests using [[Bearger]]'s charge attack without putting Bearger at risk. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== File:Palmcone Tree Burnt.png|Burnt RWP Palmcone Tree Concept Art.png|Concept art of Palmcone Tree shown in Rhymes With Play stream. {{clear}} {{Naturally Spawning Objects}} [[vi:Palmcone_Tree]] [[Category:Trees]]
